Bash(unset AWS_WEB_IDENTITY_TOKEN_FILE && unset AWS_ROLE_ARN && unset AWS_ROLE_SESSION_NAME && AWS_PROFILE=personal aws ssm send-command \\
  --instance-ids i-03874197d725b0455 \\
  --document-name "AWS-RunShellScript" \\
  --parameters 'commands=["fallocate -l 2G /swapfile 2>/dev/null || true","chmod 600 /swapfile","mkswap /swapfile 2>/dev/null || true","swapon /swapfile 2>/dev/null || true","grep -q /swapfile /etc/fstab || echo \\"/swapfile swap swap defaults 0 0\\" >> /etc/fstab","echo 10 > /proc/sys/vm/swappiness","echo vm.swappiness=10 >> /etc/sysctl.d/99-swap.conf","echo 50 > /proc/sys/vm/vfs_cache_pressure","echo vm.vfs_cache_pressure=50 >> /etc/sysctl.d/99-swap.conf","free -h"]' \\
  --region us-east-1 \\
  --query 'Command.CommandId' \\
  --output text 2>&1)
